description: Fix dead frontend builds for quantmax, quantneon, and quantedits. These 3 apps are missing Next.js infrastructure entirely - no next.config.js, no 'next' dependency in package.json, no build/typecheck/start scripts. They use a Pages Router pattern (src/pages/_app.tsx) with React components. Add full Next.js 15 support with proper configs, scripts, webpack externals for Node.js packages, and tailwind/postcss setup so they build successfully with `next build`.
steps: Update apps/quantmax/package.json: add 'next' (^15.5.16), 'react' (^19.0.0), 'react-dom' (^19.0.0) to dependencies if not present. Add scripts: dev, build (next build), start (next start), typecheck (tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json). Add devDeps: autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss, vitest. Use the pattern from apps/quantchat/package.json as reference.

Create apps/quantmax/next.config.js following the pattern from apps/quantchat/next.config.js: transpilePackages for @quant/shared-ui and @quant/common, output standalone, serverExternalPackages for nats, webpack fallbacks for Node.js builtins (net, tls, dns, fs, http, https, stream, crypto, zlib, child_process, os, path, events, buffer, url, util), and externals for nats/ws/ioredis.
Create apps/quantmax/postcss.config.js with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins (copy from apps/quantchat/postcss.config.js).
Create apps/quantmax/tailwind.config.ts following the pattern in apps/quantchat/tailwind.config.ts.
Update apps/quantmax/tsconfig.json to include 'jsx': 'preserve' for Next.js compatibility, add proper 'paths' for @ imports, and include next-env.d.ts.
Repeat steps 1-5 for apps/quantneon (same approach, same reference patterns).
Repeat steps 1-5 for apps/quantedits (same approach, same reference patterns).
Ensure all 3 apps have proper src/pages/_app.tsx that works with Next.js Pages Router - these already exist and should work.
Run `pnpm install` to link new dependencies, then run `pnpm turbo build --filter=@quant/quantmax --filter=@quant/quantneon --filter=@quant/quantedits` to verify all 3 build successfully.
acceptance_criteria: All 3 apps have next.config.js with proper webpack externals and transpilePackages
